title: The Golden Bell Rings
description: Luffy’s power becomes the one natural counter to Enel’s lightning as the final strike comes within reach.
scene: Across pages 24, this scene focuses on Luffy, Narrator, Enel, Nami, Wyper. Luffy’s power becomes the one natural counter to Enel’s lightning as the final strike comes within reach.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's going on in Upper Yard...!?

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Oh well... To prevent their approach,
